name: Mom's Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix half of the cake mix with the butter, eggs and vanilla until smooth. Add the remaining cake mix, chocolate chips and nuts. Drop by teaspoon onto an ungreased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart. Bake for 10-12 minutes (centers will be soft). Cool slightly before removing from the pan. Do not leave on cookie sheet for too long as the cookies will continue to bake and become hard instead of soft and chewy.
